description_long: This table features a thick, rectangular wooden top with a natural, slightly uneven edge, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance. The tabletop displays a rich, dark brown wood grain with visible texture and subtle variations in color. Supporting the top are two robust, intersecting metal legs in a geometric X-shape, finished in a sleek metallic silver that contrasts with the wood. The legs are angled outward, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing clean lines and functional form. This table would be well-suited for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern table with a thick, dark wood top and intersecting metallic X-shaped legs, combining rustic and contemporary styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and the prominent X-shaped metal leg structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the angled, outward-facing metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again displaying the X-shaped metal support and the wood grain surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop thickness and the geometric leg arrangement.
